data.requirement: Extract and aggregate sales data (order_total) from the 'blinkit_orders' table across three time dimensions: daily, weekly, and monthly.
data.reason: This allows us to analyze sales patterns and their fluctuations over different time frames, which aligns with the user's goal of identifying seasonal trends.

data.requirement: Integrate promotional data (campaign_name and spend) from the 'blinkit_marketing_performance' table with sales data to analyze how campaigns influence sales peaks and troughs.
data.reason: Overlaying sales data with marketing campaign timelines helps reveal the effectiveness of promotions in driving sales performance.

data.requirement: Identify and extract holiday or event-based sales data by mapping sales records (order_date) to external event calendars.
data.reason: Understanding the impact of holidays and events on sales aids in identifying external factors driving peaks or troughs in sales patterns.

data.requirement: Compute derived metrics such as average daily sales, standard deviation, and cumulative monthly sales from the aggregated data for deeper insights into sales performance.
data.reason: Derived metrics help go beyond simple aggregation to identify variability and growth trends in sales performance.

data.requirement: Include the 'category' feature from the 'blinkit_products' table to break down sales performance by product category.
data.reason: Adding category-level granularity allows for a more actionable understanding of which product categories contribute most to seasonal trends.

visualization.requirement: Use a line chart to visualize sales trends over time (daily, weekly, monthly) for overall sales performance.
visualization.reason: Line charts are optimal for visualizing continuous trends over time and enable easy detection of peaks and troughs.

visualization.requirement: Combine area charts with line charts to show cumulative monthly sales alongside daily sales trends.
visualization.reason: This dual visualization allows users to understand both granular and aggregated sales trends in a single view.

visualization.requirement: Generate a bar chart to compare monthly sales across different product categories derived from the 'category' column.
visualization.reason: Bar charts are effective for comparing categorical data, highlighting how product categories contribute to sales over time.

visualization.requirement: Utilize a heat map to show weekly sales patterns across days of the week and hours of the day.
visualization.reason: Heat maps allow for an intuitive representation of dense data across two categorical dimensions, facilitating the detection of spikes or anomalies in sales activity.

visualization.requirement: Create a scatter plot to correlate advertising spend (spend) with sales performance, highlighting campaigns from the 'blinkit_marketing_performance' table.
visualization.reason: Scatter plots are effective for identifying relationships between two numerical variables, such as spend and resulting sales.

interaction.requirement: Allow users to filter sales data by specific time ranges (e.g., months or weeks) using a brush or slider selection.
interaction.reason: Time-based filtering enables users to focus on specific periods to analyze sales trends more closely.

interaction.requirement: Integrate hover interactions to display detailed metrics (e.g., daily sales total, number of orders) on line or area charts.
interaction.reason: Hover provides micro-level insights without overwhelming the visualization, helping users quickly access relevant data points.

interaction.requirement: Enable users to toggle between different time aggregations (daily, weekly, monthly) directly in the line chart view.
interaction.reason: This interaction ensures users can seamlessly switch between various temporal dimensions for flexible analysis.

interaction.requirement: In the scatter plot, allow users to highlight and filter specific marketing campaigns (campaign_name) to see their contributions to sales trends.
interaction.reason: Filtering campaigns helps users isolate their impact, determining which campaigns were most effective for driving sales growth.

interaction.requirement: Provide drill-down interactions on bar charts or heat maps to view category-specific sales data or sales patterns within specific weeks.
interaction.reason: Drill-down interactions allow for detailed exploration of aggregated data, helping users identify drivers behind observed sales patterns.
